name: explore_6e_d352_v2
hypothesis: 6 experts at dim=352 (corrected: num_heads=8 for divisibility). More routing paths (6 vs 4) with slightly smaller model. Tests whether routing diversity matters more than raw dimension.
changes_summary: NUM_EXPERTS=6, MODEL_DIM=352, NUM_HEADS=8, NUM_KV_HEADS=4. Fixed from explore_6e_d352 which crashed (352 % 6 != 0). 8 heads chosen as smallest power-of-2 that divides 352. head_dim=44.
fixes: explore_6e_d352 crashed with ValueError: model_dim must be divisible by num_heads. num_heads changed 6→8.
